raw: {"claim_id":"CLAIM_04_multi_pileup_severe","policy_doc_id":"policy_3_quickclaim_general","items":[{"damage_class":"dent","verdict":"covered","rationale":"The operative clause (chunk_00086) confirms indemnity for accidental loss or damage to the vehicle, covering body panel dents. Exclusion chunk_00095 only excludes dents from metal fatigue, long‑term vibration stress or corrosion, which are not applicable to impact‑induced dents in this incident.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00086"]},{"damage_class":"crack","verdict":"needs_review","rationale":"Coverage clause chunk_00093 refers to tyre damage and does not address cracks in body panels. Exclusion chunk_00102 limits coverage to internal mechanical component cracks, which does not apply here. Without a specific coverage clause for panel cracks, the claim cannot be confirmed as covered.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00093"]},{"damage_class":"broken_lamp","verdict":"needs_review","rationale":"Coverage clause chunk_00093 is unrelated to lamp damage. Exclusion clauses (chunks_00105, 00106, 00107) exclude lamp damage caused by electrical faults, non‑OEM bulbs, or interior lighting, but do not cover impact‑induced headlamp breakage. Lacking a dedicated coverage clause for lamp damage, the claim status is uncertain.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00093"]}],"overall_recommendation":"Proceed with claim for dent; further review required for crack and broken lamp damage.","escalate_to_human":false,"escalation_reason":null}

items.rationale: The operative clause (chunk_00086) confirms indemnity for accidental loss or damage to the vehicle, covering body panel dents. Exclusion chunk_00095 only excludes dents from metal fatigue, long‑term vibration stress or corrosion, which are not applicable to impact‑induced dents in this incident.

Coverage clause chunk_00093 refers to tyre damage and does not address cracks in body panels. Exclusion chunk_00102 limits coverage to internal mechanical component cracks, which does not apply here. Without a specific coverage clause for panel cracks, the claim cannot be confirmed as covered.

Coverage clause chunk_00093 is unrelated to lamp damage. Exclusion clauses (chunks_00105, 00106, 00107) exclude lamp damage caused by electrical faults, non‑OEM bulbs, or interior lighting, but do not cover impact‑induced headlamp breakage. Lacking a dedicated coverage clause for lamp damage, the claim status is uncertain.

parsed.overall_recommendation: Proceed with claim for dent; further review required for crack and broken lamp damage.

raw: {"claim_id":"CLAIM_08_crack_lamp_rearend","policy_doc_id":"policy_4_autoguard_premium","items":[{"damage_class":"crack","verdict":"excluded","rationale":"The coverage clause for cracks (chunk_00121) specifies coverage for cracks to bumpers, door panels, and trims from impact. The incident describes a crack in the tail‑light housing, which is part of the lighting assembly, not a bumper or trim. No clause covers cracks in lamp housings, and no exclusion applies to this type of crack. Therefore the crack is excluded.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00121"]},{"damage_class":"broken_lamp","verdict":"covered","rationale":"The coverage clause for broken lamps (chunk_00121) explicitly lists tail lamps as covered when broken by impact. The incident narrative confirms a broken tail‑light housing due to a rear‑end shunt. None of the lamp exclusions (chunks_00132, 00134, 00133) apply because the damage is physical and caused by an accident. Hence the broken lamp is covered.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00121"]}],"overall_recommendation":"Approve claim for broken lamp; deny claim for crack in tail‑light housing.","escalate_to_human":false,"escalation_reason":null}

items.rationale: The coverage clause for cracks (chunk_00121) specifies coverage for cracks to bumpers, door panels, and trims from impact. The incident describes a crack in the tail‑light housing, which is part of the lighting assembly, not a bumper or trim. No clause covers cracks in lamp housings, and no exclusion applies to this type of crack. Therefore the crack is excluded.

The coverage clause for broken lamps (chunk_00121) explicitly lists tail lamps as covered when broken by impact. The incident narrative confirms a broken tail‑light housing due to a rear‑end shunt. None of the lamp exclusions (chunks_00132, 00134, 00133) apply because the damage is physical and caused by an accident. Hence the broken lamp is covered.

parsed.overall_recommendation: Approve claim for broken lamp; deny claim for crack in tail‑light housing.

raw: {"claim_id":"CLAIM_10_tyre_scratch_flood_debris","policy_doc_id":"policy_5_valuemotor","items":[{"damage_class":"flat_tyre","verdict":"covered","rationale":"Tyre damage is covered at 50% replacement cost, and the policy specifies this coverage only when the vehicle has also sustained body damage in the same incident. The incident narrative indicates a tyre puncture and road rash scratches on the lower sill, confirming concurrent body damage. Therefore the condition is satisfied and the claim is covered.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00152","chunk_00155"]},{"damage_class":"scratch","verdict":"covered","rationale":"The policy covers cosmetic damage such as scratches caused by accidental collision or impact. The incident narrative describes scratches on the lower sill, which falls under this coverage. No exclusions apply to this type of scratch in the provided clauses.","cited_chunk_ids":["chunk_00149","chunk_00150"]}],"overall_recommendation":"Proceed with claim processing for both flat tyre and scratch as covered.","escalate_to_human":false,"escalation_reason":null}

items.rationale: Tyre damage is covered at 50% replacement cost, and the policy specifies this coverage only when the vehicle has also sustained body damage in the same incident. The incident narrative indicates a tyre puncture and road rash scratches on the lower sill, confirming concurrent body damage. Therefore the condition is satisfied and the claim is covered.

The policy covers cosmetic damage such as scratches caused by accidental collision or impact. The incident narrative describes scratches on the lower sill, which falls under this coverage. No exclusions apply to this type of scratch in the provided clauses.

parsed.overall_recommendation: Proceed with claim processing for both flat tyre and scratch as covered.
